The '''Meeks''' were a furry [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]] that stood on two hind legs. They were related to the [[moocher]]s of [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]]. They foraged through the trash on the [[Free Trader]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

{{Creature-stub}}
